name: HRE_TOUCHPT_CHECK_IN_INTRCNS_V
query: SELECT REFERENCE_ID, STATUS_CODE, ENGAGEMENT_TYPE, ENGAGEMENT_DATE, CREATED_FOR_PERSON_ID WORKER_PERSON_ID, CREATED_FOR_ASSIGNMENT_ID WORKER_ASSIGNMENT_ID, CREATED_BY_PERSON_ID, CREATED_BY_ASSIGNMENT_ID, CREATED_FOR_ASSIGNMENT_ID, CREATED_FOR_MANAGER_PERSON_ID, HIDDEN_FLAG, VISIBILITY, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, REQUEST_ID, CHECKIN_TOPICS_DISCUSSED_COUNT, CHECKIN_TOPICS_TOTAL_COUNT, OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, CREATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, TEMPLATE_ID, REVIEW_PERIOD_ID, LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM hre_touchpt_empl_evts_intrcns where ENGAGEMENT_TYPE IN ('ORA_HRE_CHECK-IN','ORA_HRE_RECURRING_CHECK-IN','ORA_HRE_PERFORMANCE_CHECK-IN')
